title: Collect and Exit Steam Fixture

electronWrapper.trustedWritePolicy: read-only wrapper bridge; Rust/local owns trusted validation; no direct trusted writes

generatedStatePolicy: Generated Windows artifacts and depot builds stay untracked unless fixture-scoped.
boundary: Wrap existing web runtime only; Rust/local owns trusted validation; Electron/browser/Studio surfaces are read-only with no direct trusted writes; Steam account/signing/content survey/Release button are human/Ring-3; no Release button automation; Steam desktop export is not Layer-3 cloud/mobile.
